list.text: Click action below to reset tracker location
Points must be specified in a counterclockwise order

list.latex: g_{etClosestContinent}\left(p\right)=\left\{p.y<-78:\ A,\ p.y>80:\ B,\ p.y<p.x:\ \left\{p.y<-p.x+10:\ C,\ D\right\},\ p.y>p.x+130\left\{p.y<-p.x-60\right\}:\ F,\ E\right\}

list.text: extending a horizontal ray rightward from p, does it intersect the segment from p1 to p2?

is p inside the polygon with list of vertices P?
*not very careful with edge cases of p on a segment or at a vertex, shouldn't matter in this case!
*assumes no edges of polygon are horizontal. If there is a horizontal edge, tweak one of the y-coordinates a tiny bit
Set the point to the location of where you want the arrow to be located.
Set this point to the exact coordinates of where the draggable point starts.
Adjust the angle of rotation as needed
May need to adjust position of the label
Change this variable name to whatever name is appropriate for your build. Be sure to make the same change in the definition of s_{howInitialArrow}.
